---
title: "Zichen Zhang"
---

## Welcome

Hi, I’m **Zichen Zhang**, a graduate student in **Applied Business Analytics** at **Boston University**.

This website is built with **Quarto** and hosted on **GitHub Pages**, and it showcases my coursework, projects, and technical skills.

---

## Coursework & Skills

- **AD599** – Python and SQL for Business Analytics  
- **AD571** – Business Analytics Foundations  
- **AD632** – Financial Concepts  

**Skills**: Python, SQL, R, Data Analysis, Git, AWS, Quarto

---

## Example: Python Demo

```{python}
import pandas as pd

data = {
    "Course": ["AD599", "AD571", "AD632"],
    "Topic": ["Python and SQL BA", "BA Foundations", "Finance"],
    "Difficulty": [4, 4, 5]
}

pd.DataFrame(data)
